mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month momentum in real consumer demand, proxied by rising RSAFS relative to CPIAUCSL, raises expected corporate revenue growth and produces positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest RSAFS value available before 2014-02-15 was 427829.0 and CPIAUCSL was 234.582
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month real RSAFS growth is followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in no more than 50% of observations or has walk-forward Rank IC below 0.03 over rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A crossing of UNRATE above its trailing 6-month average by more than 0.3 percentage points signals deteriorating labor demand, weaker household income growth, and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE crosses above its trailing 6-month average by > 0.3pp
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations produce positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if subsequent PAYEMS growth does not slow after the trigger.

mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS remains below 0.25% while INDPRO is rising over 3 months, liquidity is abundant during an improving production cycle, lowering discount-rate pressure and producing positive S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest FEDFUNDS available before 2014-02-15 was 0.07 and INDPRO was 101.0251
failure_condition: Reject if the joint FEDFUNDS-low and INDPRO-rising condition does not outperform unconditional 20-day returns by at least 2 percentage points annualized in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: A 6-month acceleration in CPIAUCSL inflation while FEDFUNDS stays below 0.5% signals rising real-rate suppression and future tightening risk; equity valuation multiples contract, producing negative 20-day S&P 500 returns.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 6-month annualized inflation crosses above its trailing 12-month inflation rate by > 0.5pp while FEDFUNDS < 0.5%
evidence_refs: fact:latest CPIAUCSL available before 2014-02-15 was 234.582 and FEDFUNDS was 0.07
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if valuation-sensitive selloffs are not more frequent than in non-triggered periods.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in HOUST signals weakening interest-rate-sensitive demand and weaker future construction-linked earnings, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST crosses below its trailing 12-month average by > 10%
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST breakdown signals are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of observations or if HOUST declines do not lead weaker GDPC1 growth.

mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month INDPRO momentum signals improving capacity utilization and operating leverage for listed firms, raising expected earnings revisions and producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if positive INDPRO momentum has a 5-day forward hit rate at or below 50% or a negative average forward return after accounting for publication lags.

mechanism_narrative: PAYEMS growth above its trailing 12-month average while UNRATE is falling signals accelerating employment income without labor-market stress, supporting consumption and positive S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 3-month average change crosses above its trailing 12-month average and UNRATE 3-month change < 0
evidence_refs: fact:latest PAYEMS available before 2014-02-15 was 137499.0 and UNRATE was 6.6
failure_condition: Reject if the joint payroll-acceleration and falling-unemployment condition fails to produce higher 20-day returns than PAYEMS-only signals in at least 60% of rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Above-trend GDPC1 growth combined with stable CPIAUCSL inflation signals real demand expansion without margin-eroding price pressure, increasing earnings expectations and producing positive S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 2-quarter annualized growth crosses above 2% while CPIAUCSL 6-month annualized inflation remains below 3%
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations do not deliver higher 60-day S&P 500 returns than unconditional returns or if the signal loses significance after excluding recession months.
